description_long: This object consists of three green, vertically standing snack packages labeled 'Bala de Alho', with a pile of individually wrapped candies placed in front. The packaging features a light green and white striped design with a stylized garlic bulb graphic and bold white text on the front. The front of each bag has a transparent window revealing the pale green candies inside, which are irregularly shaped and glossy. The back of the packages displays nutritional information in a white box, surrounded by the same striped green pattern. The sides of the packages are solid green, showing the thinness of the packaging material. The candies themselves are small, smooth, and appear to be hard or semi-hard, likely individually wrapped within the bag.
description: Three green 'Bala de Alho' snack packages with a striped design and transparent windows display pale green candies inside, accompanied by a pile of candies in front. The packaging is visually striking with bold white text and a garlic bulb graphic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Bala de Alho' branding, transparent windows with visible candies, and a pile of candies in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the packages and the pile of candies, with minimal branding visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutritional information panels and the striped green pattern on the back of the packages.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open sides of the packages and the pile of candies, with less branding visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The front of each package displays a white and green 'Bala de Alho' logo with a stylized garlic bulb graphic, located at the top center of the packaging.
attribute_flavor_indication: The packaging features a garlic bulb graphic and the text 'Bala de Alho', indicating a garlic flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A white nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of each package, listing nutritional information.
